_comment: Prod Cube workspace registry. Loaded in the container via WORKSPACES_CONFIG_PATH (see docker-compose.prod.yml) so the local-dev workspaces.config.json stays unchanged. URLs live here, NOT in .env — the gateway resolves workspace id -> cubeApiUrl from this file (SSRF guard). Default is the in-stack `local` workspace (minted, per-user RBAC via cube_api's AUTH_API_URL bridge) so :11000 and prod land on the same surface the dev loop (:3000) uses; the external open `prod` cube-dev (cube.gds.vng.vn) stays selectable.

workspaces._comment: In-stack cube-dev (docker-compose.prod.yml cube_api service). Reached over the compose network at cube_api:4000 — NOT the published host port (17001 is browser-only). Multi-tenant: authMode=minted so the JWT's game claim selects the tenant schema.
workspaces.label: Local Workspace
